---
title: "Mining online political opinion surveys for suspect entries: An interdisciplinary comparison"
author: "Djouvas, C., Mendez, F., and Tsapatsoulis, N."
date: 2016-01-01
description: "Journal of Innovation in Digital Ecosystems, 3(2), 172–182"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
